subject: [RFC PATCH 5/8] dax/kmem: add the hotunplug opt-in (CAP_HOTUNPLUG) for private nodes

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch adds the capability for private nodes to opt-in to hotunplug, allowing their memory to be bulk-evacuated when a device is removed. This feature is controlled by the CAP_HOTUNPLUG flag and can be toggled through sysfs attributes. The goal of this change is to improve system manageability and flexibility in scenarios where devices need to be removed or replaced.
